summary: Execute staged end-to-end Virginia Green smoke test through CID->SID->MID with strict step gating and reporting, using direct signal_queue insert and stopping before any live Mailgun send.

execution_requirements: Sequential execution only with hard verification gates between steps
Stop on first failure and report exact failure reason
Do not use lcs.bridge_pressure_signals(); insert directly into lcs.signal_queue
Do NOT send real email; stop before live Mailgun trigger
Report per step: number, PASS/FAIL, data written, issues
steps: Insert bridged signal into lcs.signal_queue directly
Run CID compiler logic and write lcs.cid COMPILED row
Run SID worker logic and write lcs.sid_output row
Run MID engine logic and write lcs.mid_sequence_state QUEUED row with LOVABLE adapter/channel MG
Verify Lovable pickup path via lcs.event delivery record without triggering live Mailgun
